title: Category Queries
description: CQRS Query contracts for Category retrieval

GetAllCategoriesQuery.title: GetAllCategoriesQuery
GetAllCategoriesQuery.description: Retrieve all categories (system + custom) for current user

userId.description: User ID (extracted from JWT context; typically not provided in request)

GetAllCategoriesQueryResponse.title: GetAllCategoriesQueryResponse
GetAllCategoriesQueryResponse.description: List of all categories (system + custom) grouped by type

SearchCategoriesQuery.title: SearchCategoriesQuery
SearchCategoriesQuery.description: Search categories by name (case-insensitive substring match)

userId.description: User ID (extracted from JWT context; typically not provided)

searchTerm.description: Search term to match against category names

SearchCategoriesQueryResponse.title: SearchCategoriesQueryResponse
SearchCategoriesQueryResponse.description: List of categories matching search term

CategoryDto.title: CategoryDto
CategoryDto.description: Category data transfer object (for API/Frontend responses)

isSystemDefault.description: True if this is a system default category (immutable)
